tasks.prompt: In v4, Map and Set values returned by defaulted schemas are shared references rather than independent copies. tasks.prompt: In v4, calling .merge() on a ZodObject that has refinements (e.g., .refine(), .superRefine()) silently discards those refinements from the merged result, while .extend() preserves them.
